stance_by_source.summary: Long entry 25–30 (gap rebalance from 2018–2020) targeting 43–46 extension to ATH retest; alternative short at 39 for 33–35 downside; grade 6/10 partial confidence
Resurfaced FDP as Zero's old long setup; price ~28.2 in fib retrace zone 26–32 above 2W/4W BB support 25.64; structure confirms entry zone is live

plain_english: Fresh Del Monte is in its primary long entry zone (25–30) at current price ~28.2, sitting comfortably above two-week Bollinger Band support at 25.64. Both the technical structure from a year ago and fresh community confirmation today agree this is a valid rebalance entry. Targets are 43–46, representing a climb back to prior all-time-high levels. Your stop is at 25.64; if price closes below that, the setup breaks and the trade is done. The setup is not contested—both sources align on the long thesis. Conviction is moderate (6/10) because the original chart analysis is old and carried only partial confidence from Zero, but it's validated by current price action. Action: enter or add to longs at current levels targeting the 43–46 zone.
